testsequencebunuiextracterrorcloudflaremarkupstoreutilapidbreactschemafirestore

Cache of `EndpointStore` objects for a single endpoint, keyed by serialized payload. - Use `get(payload)` to retrieve or create the `EndpointStore` for a given payload.

endpoint

Endpoint<P, R>

provider

APIProvider<P, R>

get

(payload: P, caller: AnyCaller = this.get) => EndpointStore<P, R>

Get (or create) the `EndpointStore` for the given payload.

call

(payload: P, maxAge: number = AVOID_REFRESH, caller: AnyCaller = this.call) => Promise<R>

Fetch (or return a cached result) for the given payload. - Returns the cached value immediately if one exists. - Waits for the in-flight fetch if the store is loading. - Throws if the fetch fails, matching `APIProvider.call` behaviour.

invalidate

(payload: P, caller: AnyCaller = this.invalidate) => void

Invalidate a specific store.

invalidateAll

() => void

Invalidate all stores.

refresh

(payload: P, maxAge?: number, caller: AnyCaller = this.invalidate) => Promise<void>

Trigger a refetch on a specific store.

refreshAll

(maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

Trigger a refetch on all stores.
